creator: koobs@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hi Moggie, thanks for your submission!

Here's a review below to help you with future contributions:

* Fatal portlint warnings:

FATAL: Makefile: MASTER_SITES appears out-of-order.
FATAL: Makefile: order must be PORTNAME/PORTVERSION/DISTVERSIONPREFIX/DISTVERSION/DISTVERSIONSUFFIX/PORTREVISION/PORTEPOCH/CATEGORIES/MASTER_SITES/MASTER_SITE_SUBDIR/PROJECTHOST/PKGNAMEPREFIX/PKGNAMESUFFIX/DISTNAME/EXTRACT_SUFX/DISTFILES/DIST_SUBDIR/EXTRACT_ONLY.

* pkg-descr patch replaced space with tab, not the other way around as expected (reversed patch?)

* DISTVERSIONPREFIX/DISTVERSIONSUFFIX not strictly necessary

* LICENSE must not contain BSD, instead use BSD[234]CLAUSE

Tip: Put DEVELOPER=yes into /etc/make.conf to enable Port Developer QA warnings
